lines.speaker: Guard
lines.text: You don't want to mess with me, human.

lines.speaker: Guard
lines.text: If you're thinking of trying anything, you'll quickly find yourself regretting it.

lines.speaker: Guard
lines.text: What do you think you're doing, human?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh... I was just going to check out the inside of this house.

lines.speaker: Guard
lines.text: This isn't a house, it's a... Actually, human, it's none of your business!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well now you've just made me curious. What's in there?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Is it a really large anvil?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Is it a dwarf with a really long beard?

lines.speaker: Guard
lines.text: Why don't you ask me again?!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Is it a dwarf with a really long beard?

lines.speaker: Guard
lines.text: Ask me another question! I dare you!
